news-global-econ.title: GOP candidate cites ‘failure’ of Newsom, Dems as new poll shows Republicans leading crowded California field
news-global-econ.description: Steve Hilton, a Republican running for governor, said that the “absolute failure" by California Gov. Gavin Newsom and Democrats means that the GOP has a real shot at victory this year.

news-global-econ.title: 3 Teenage Girls File Lawsuit Against Elon Musk's xAI Claiming Grok Generated Deepfake Child Pornography
news-global-econ.description:
Three teenage girls have filed a class-action lawsuit against Elon Musk's AI company xAI, alleging that its Grok image generator was used to create and distribute child sexual abuse material featuring their likenesses.

news-global-econ.title: NATO heavyweights balk at Hormuz mission as Trump warns alliance at risk
news-global-econ.description: UK, France and Germany decline combat role in protecting key oil chokepoint, drawing warnings from Trump and GOP allies about NATO’s reliability.

news-korea-soc.title: Winning the battles, losing the war? America must define the endgame in Iran
news-korea-soc.description: Pete Hegseth acknowledges Iran campaign success but some question whether airstrikes achieve regime change goals as Mojtaba Khamenei vows to fight.
